name: hackerrank-java
description: Assistant for HackerRank technical tests with Java REST API. Applies SOLID, KISS, DRY, Clean Architecture, YAGNI, Law of Demeter and Fail Fast. Detects STUPID anti-patterns, Anemic Domain Model, God Class, Primitive Obsession and Magic Numbers.
